title: Bizarre Border Crossing Secrets!

scenes.text: Some illegal border crossing routes are incredibly dangerous!
Traveling these routes can mean risking exposure to extreme elements.
Many people undertake these journeys despite the risks involved.
Desperation drives individuals to take perilous paths.
scenes.label: DESPERATE JOURNEY

scenes.text: Follow so you never run out of fun facts.

description: Illegal border crossings are fraught with danger. Discover the risks people take for a better life and follow for daily facts!
